sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,28): error TLUA1110: Type expected.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,29): error TLUA2538: Type 'unknown' cannot be used as an index type.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,36): error TLUA1005: ']' expected.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,42): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,42): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'infer'.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,48): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'X'.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,48): error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,51): error TLUA2693: 'unknown' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,58): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,60): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,62): error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,62): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'X'.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,63): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(1,65): error TLUA2693: 'never' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(2,16): error TLUA2314: Generic type 'Middle' requires 1 type argument(s).
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(2,23): error TLUA1005: '>' expected.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(2,26): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua(2,27): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.


==== sliceTupleTypeOutOfBounds.tlua (18 errors) ====
    type Middle<T> = T extends [unknown, ... infer X, unknown] ? X: never;
                               ~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
                                ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2538: Type 'unknown' cannot be used as an index type.
                                       ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ']' expected.
                                             ~~~~~

                                             ~~~~~

    type Example = Middle<[1]>;
                   ~~~~~~~
